assessment.note: [SHALLOW] 'clearer scope' names a vague need but not what scope was unclear — role, decision rights, or expected impact.

new_queue.label: Define scope
new_queue.name: When you say 'clearer scope' — what specifically was unclear to you?
new_queue.description: Clarifies what 'scope' means so the feedback gap becomes concrete.

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?
new_queue.description: Distinguishes comfort-zone execution from genuine growth moments.

new_queue.label: Current footing
new_queue.name: What's feeling solid in your role right now, Maria?
new_queue.description: Opens with a calm read on where her Principal work feels steady before any harder topics.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Next chapter
new_queue.name: What kind of impact do you want your work to have this year?
new_queue.description: Moves from vague ambition to the kind of contribution she wants to be known for.

new_queue.label: Manager leverage
new_queue.name: Where would you want more from me to move this forward?
new_queue.description: Finds the specific kind of manager support that would actually unblock her next step.

new_queue.label: Tradeoffs now
new_queue.name: What would you need to stop doing to make room for the next step?
new_queue.description: Forces a real tradeoff between current commitments and future growth.
